% ===== App J.10.1: Power requirements for underpowered cells =====
% Hand-managed inside PRESERVED block; sourced from \PaperSignStabilityTableBody.
% n_req = ceil(42 * (1.645 / Phi^{-1}(P_current))^2). Sign-unstable cells (P<0.5)
% render as NA — formula is undefined when current bootstrap doesn't favor the
% pre-registered direction.
\newcommand{\PaperPbetaCyberStrategic}{0.74}
\newcommand{\PaperPbetaCyberCausal}{0.90}
\newcommand{\PaperPbetaMedSpatial}{0.94}
\newcommand{\PaperPbetaFinStrategic}{0.94}
\newcommand{\PaperPbetaSciCausal}{0.91}
\newcommand{\PaperPbetaSciSpatial}{0.45}
\newcommand{\PaperNreqCyberStrategic}{275}
\newcommand{\PaperNreqCyberCausal}{70}
\newcommand{\PaperNreqMedSpatial}{48}
\newcommand{\PaperNreqFinStrategic}{48}
\newcommand{\PaperNreqSciCausal}{64}
\newcommand{\PaperNreqSciSpatial}{\textit{NA}}
% Roadmap thresholds: easy = max n_req with directional consistency ≤ 100;
% hard = max n_req for sign-stable but weak-signal cells.
\newcommand{\PaperUnderpoweredEasyTarget}{70}
\newcommand{\PaperUnderpoweredHardTarget}{275}
